title: Buttery Crumble Marshmallow
description: This quick-fix Jamaican dish features miniature marshmallows coated in a butterscotch glaze and topped with a crispy crumble for an indulgent yet low-calorie dessert.
instructions: Microwave the unsalted butter and glucose syrup/honey mixture for about 30 seconds until melted.
Add vanilla extract and stir well to combine. Remove from heat and allow it to cool slightly.
Dip each marshmallow into the cooled glaze, ensuring they are evenly coated.
Sprinkle coconut flakes over a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Arrange the crumbed marshmallows on top of the coconut flakes in an even layer.
Preheat your oven to 150°C (300°F) and bake for about 20 minutes or until golden brown. Keep an eye on them to prevent burning.
